title: The Mine That Died Twice
description: A robot dog is patrolling a copper mine in Utah. The coverage is about the robot. The story is about the ground it walks on.

title: Left Unattended
description: The rules that govern American pits were written to protect the person in the cab. The trucks running Texas quarries today have no one in them.

title: Who Inspects the Inspector’s Brain
description: I have walked my plant with MSHA inspectors more times than I can count.
